prompts.prompt: Build a media gallery that mixes images and videos. Clicking any item opens a lightbox viewer. Videos should show native playback controls. Images should support zoom on double-click.
Build a feedback form that opens in a dialog. It should have a title field, a long-form text area for comments, and a submit button. Show a success state after submission.
A GitHub-style issue label picker with color dots and search
Build a file upload component that shows a progress bar during upload. Display the filename, file size, and percentage complete. Show a success state when done.

Show a content library table where each row has a small colored pill for its type — Article, Video, Podcast, Newsletter, and Course each need their own distinct color so they're easy to tell apart at a glance. The colors should stay consistent everywhere a type appears.
Cards that stack vertically on mobile but show in a grid on desktop
A file upload button that shows progress and calls an upload endpoint
Set up the root layout for a new internal tool. Include proper body styling, theme provider with neutralTheme, and a layout with header and main content area.
Build a metrics dashboard card that shows a label like 'Total Revenue', a large numeric value like '$12,340.56', and a small supporting line that says '+12% from last month'
I want to customize the card component's appearance in my theme — add a gradient border and increase the border radius. How do I do component-level style overrides in the Astryx theme?
